---
title: "Demonstrating coinbase"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Demonstrating coinbase}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  fig.width = 8,
  fig.height = 5,
  dpi = 150,
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

## Introduction

This vignette will demonstrate usage of the `coinbase` package.
